display.purpose: Auth heroes. One per page. Ink Primary on Surface Base.

title.purpose: Section headers, card headings, panel titles.

body.purpose: Descriptions, change summaries. Max 65ch. Ink Secondary on dark.

label.purpose: Category labels. Uppercase, spaced. Ink Tertiary. Once per section.

mono.purpose: URLs, counts, percentages, timestamps, selectors. Ink Tertiary.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, popovers, tooltips on dark surfaces. Heavy because L3/L1 surface delta is small.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: The only glow. CTA accent button at rest and focused primary inputs.

shadows.name: frame
shadows.purpose: Browser preview frame component. Once per major section.

motion.name: sweep-in
motion.keyframes: from { clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); opacity: 0; } to { clip-path: inset(0 0% 0 0); opacity: 1; }
motion.purpose: The system's identity entrance. Applied to monitor rows, alert rows, page section headers on mount. Gated by prefers-reduced-motion. NOT for persistent chrome.

motion.name: header-reveal
motion.keyframes: from { opacity: 0; filter: blur(4px); } to { opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); }
motion.purpose: Page header on route change. Blur-opacity reveal.

motion.name: dot-pulse
motion.keyframes: 0%,100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(0.85); }
motion.purpose: Live status dot only. Loops ambient. Only the green dot; no other element loops.

motion.name: lift
motion.purpose: Button hover lift. State transition, not entrance.

components.name: Accent CTA Button
components.description: The primary CTA. Cyan fill on dark background; the most visible element on any page. One per primary action zone.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-accent"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="14"/><line x1="2" y1="8" x2="14" y2="8"/></svg>Add monitor</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; padding: 0 18px; height: 38px; border-radius: 10px; border: none; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.005em; background: #06B6D4; color: #042F36; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(6,182,212,0.4), 0 0 24px rgba(6,182,212,0.2); transition: transform 0.12s cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1), background 0.15s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #22D3EE; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-accent:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #06B6D4, 0 0 0 4px rgba(6,182,212,0.25); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary / cancel actions on dark. Stroke-only. Nearly invisible at rest; clarifies on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 18px; height: 38px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.12s cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #06B6D4; }

components.name: Monitor Row (Sweep Entrance)
components.description: The primary content unit. Dense list row. Clip-path sweep on mount, 60ms stagger. Action buttons appear on hover only.
components.html:
Competitor pricingacme.com/pricing
1h14m ago+2.4%
components.css: @keyframes sd-sweep-in { from { clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); opacity: 0; } to { clip-path: inset(0 0% 0 0); opacity: 1; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-monitor-row { animation: none !important; opacity: 1 !important; clip-path: none !important; } } .ds-monitor-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); background: transparent; animation: sd-sweep-in 350ms cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1) both; animation-delay: calc(var(--index, 0) * 60ms); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s ease; } .ds-monitor-row:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); } .ds-monitor-row:hover .ds-row-actions { opacity: 1; } .ds-status-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-status-dot--live { background: #10B981; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(16,185,129,0.18); animation: dot-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes dot-pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(0.85); } } .ds-row-main { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-row-name { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #F1F5F9; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-row-url { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11.5px; color: #64748B; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-row-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #64748B; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-row-meta { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #64748B; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-row-change { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-row-change--up { color: #34D399; } .ds-row-change--down { color: #F87171; } .ds-row-actions { display: flex; gap: 4px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-row-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #94A3B8; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s ease, color 0.12s ease; } .ds-row-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); color: #F1F5F9; }

components.name: URL Input (Dark)
components.description: Mono font for URL, CSS selector, regex inputs. Surface Card background. Cyan border + ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input-url { display: block; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); background: #0F172A; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #F1F5F9; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input-url::placeholder { color: #475569; } .ds-input-url:focus { outline: none; border-color: #06B6D4; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(6,182,212,0.15); } .ds-input-url:disabled { background: #07090C; color: #475569; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Live Status Pill
components.description: Read-only live status on dark surfaces. Green dot with pulse animation. Never interactive.
components.css: .ds-pill-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(16,185,129,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.28); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #34D399; } .ds-dot-live { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #10B981; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(16,185,129,0.18); animation: dot-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; flex-shrink: 0; } @keyframes dot-pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(0.85); } }

components.name: Active Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item in active state. Cyan wash fill + cyan text. Committed: the fill, not just the color.
components.html: MonitorsAlerts
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 8px; background: #05070A; width: 220px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; color: #94A3B8; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.12s ease, color 0.12s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #CBD5E1; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(6,182,212,0.15); color: #06B6D4; } .ds-nav-item--active:hover { background: rgba(6,182,212,0.22); }

components.name: Filter Pills (Active)
components.description: Interactive filter tabs. Default barely visible; active shows committed cyan wash.
components.css: .ds-filter-group { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-filter { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 30px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #64748B; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s ease, color 0.12s ease, border-color 0.12s ease; } .ds-filter:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #94A3B8; } .ds-filter--active { background: rgba(6,182,212,0.15); color: #06B6D4; border-color: rgba(6,182,212,0.25); } .ds-filter--active:hover { background: rgba(6,182,212,0.22); }

components.name: Diff Highlight
components.description: The signature display element. Inline before/after comparison. Background tint is the full annotation.
components.html: Price changed from $49/mo to $39/mo on the Enterprise tier.
components.css: .ds-diff-prose { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14.5px; color: #CBD5E1; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; } .ds-diff-add { display: inline; background: rgba(16,185,129,0.14); color: #34D399; border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 6px; } .ds-diff-del { display: inline; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.14); color: #F87171; text-decoration: line-through; text-decoration-thickness: 1.5px; border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 6px; }

narrative.overview:
The room is dark. Not because darkness looks good, but because that is when people use this tool. A startup founder at 9pm glancing at a monitor dashboard to check if the alert means a competitor dropped a price or just swapped a banner. The surfaces are dark because the data must be the brightest thing in the room.

This is a dark-first, Committed-color system. Deep surfaces, Electric Cyan carrying 20-30% visual weight across active states. The motion language is the system's identity: one entrance grammar applied everywhere — a clip-path sweep, left to right, 350ms ease-out-expo, 60ms stagger per row. When you open a page and every row of monitors uncloaks, that IS SonarDiff.

This system rejects: the SaaS-cream card grid, the neon hacker aesthetic, enterprise navigation sprawl, and consumer-app playfulness.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first: three-layer surface stack (Chrome #05070A / Base #07090C / Card #0F172A)
Committed color: Electric Cyan at 20-30% visual presence. Active states have fill, not just text.
Motion as identity: clip-path sweep is the one entrance grammar. No other entrance animation.
Geist Mono for all technical values: URLs, percentages, counts, timestamps.
Elevation via surface stepping (darker to lighter), not shadows.

rules.name: The Committed Voice Rule
rules.body: Electric Cyan is no longer at ≤10%. Active nav items, filter pills, selected rows all get the cyan wash fill. 20-30% presence: committed, not restrained.

rules.name: The Dark Stack Rule
rules.body: Surfaces stack Chrome → Base → Card → Elevated. Never invert. Card is never a page background.

rules.name: The Semantic-Only Rule
rules.body: Green, Red, Amber communicate state, not decoration. A green button is a violation.

rules.name: The Mono Gatekeeping Rule
rules.body: Geist Mono is for data: URLs, percentages, counts, timestamps. Never for headings or creative effect.

rules.name: The Dark Contrast Rule
rules.body: Body text must be Ink Primary (#F1F5F9) or Ink Secondary (#CBD5E1) on dark. Ink Tertiary (#94A3B8) is for supporting data only.

rules.name: The Lighter-Up Rule
rules.body: Elevation goes toward lighter surfaces. Shadows are for popovers only. The accent glow is the one exception.

rules.name: The One-Glow Rule
rules.body: Accent Glow is the only glow in the system. One element. On the CTA button and focused inputs only.

rules.name: The No-Nesting Rule
rules.body: Cards may not contain other cards. Nested border-radius stacks are always wrong.

rules.name: The One Sweep Rule
rules.body: Clip-path sweep is the only entrance animation. No fade-up, no scale-in, no blur-reveal as a list entrance on the same page.

dos: Do use the clip-path sweep as the only entrance animation. Stagger at 60ms per row.
Do gate the sweep and all ambient motion behind prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.
Do use Electric Cyan for all active/selected states at 20-30% presence. Active fills, not just active text.
Do use Geist Mono for every technical value. Ink Tertiary on dark surfaces.
Do use the three-layer dark stack in order: Chrome → Base → Card → Elevated.
Do pair color status with a label or icon on dark surfaces.
Do keep button hover at translateY(-1px), 120ms ease-out-expo.
Do write system copy with no exclamation points. Calm, direct.
Do support RTL layout and Cairo font for Arabic locale.
Do show monitor row actions on hover only.
donts: Don't use any entrance animation other than clip-path sweep. One grammar.
Don't apply the sweep to persistent chrome (sidebar, topbar, page shell).
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring-physics easing. ease-out-expo only.
Don't recreate the SaaS-cream dashboard. Dark three-layer stack is the answer.
Don't use neon glow on non-CTA elements. One glow: accent CTA and focused inputs.
Don't build five-level navigation or stack modals. Two clicks maximum.
Don't use emoji as UI elements or consumer-app playfulness.
Don't use border-left/right greater than 1px as accent stripe.
Don't use hero-metric template inside the dashboard shell.
Don't use Green, Red, Amber for anything except diff text, errors, monitor status.
Don't apply shadows to cards or rows at rest.
